overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a survival game character navigating a dark forest at night. The player holds a wooden club and uses a flashlight to illuminate the path while walking from dense woodland toward a rocky clearing, with light rain beginning to fall in the final moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with thick undergrowth

events.description: player character's hand holding wooden club enters lower left of frame

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through dense forest while holding a wooden club in left hand

entered.detail: tall straight pine trunks rising into the darkness
thick green bushes and low vegetation lining the path
narrow dirt trail covered with pine needles and leaves

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a densely packed forest at night. The flashlight illuminates tall pine trees and thick underbrush surrounding a narrow dirt path. Around the 4-second mark, the player's left hand gripping a wooden club comes into view as they continue navigating the enclosed woodland trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with logged tree stumps

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, navigating around cut tree stumps

entered.detail: freshly cut tree stumps protruding from the ground along the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest with vegetation thinning slightly to reveal numerous tree stumps. The dense underbrush from the previous section falls behind as the player moves forward, while the tall pines shift to the left side of the frame. The ground remains a dirt trail scattered with debris from the cut trees.

events.description: dense forest opens up to reveal large rock formation on the right side
light rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the flashlight beam

agents.ego_description: approaching a rocky clearing while maintaining grip on the wooden club

entered.detail: massive rocky outcrop or cliff face emerging from the forest
scattered trees with more open space between them

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up as the player approaches a large rock formation on the right. The tree stumps disappear behind as the terrain transitions to a more open area with sparse vegetation. Around 26 seconds, light rain becomes visible in the flashlight beam, adding to the atmospheric conditions as the player continues toward the rocky outcrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens into a sparse, rainy clearing. It begins on a narrow dirt path surrounded by densely packed pine trees and thick underbrush, with a wooden club held in the left hand as the flashlight cuts through the dark. As the camera moves forward, the vegetation begins to thin and the tall pines shift to the periphery, revealing a stretch of ground scattered with weathered tree stumps. The scene then expands as the stumps fall away and the terrain transitions into a more open area with sparse greenery. Finally, the camera approaches a large rock formation on the right while light rain begins to shimmer within the flashlight beam.
